prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年福建省物理类最低录取位次分别为约489名、470名、461名、475名、458名，整体呈小幅波动中前移趋势，近5年位次基本稳定在458–489名区间，202 5年基准位次约458名；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021–2025年均为30人，2026年计划仍为30人，连续6年保持不变，计划层面无扩缩招信号，竞争 格局基本稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国科学技术大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续稳定第7名，属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸 引力持续强劲；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面（李政道先生逝世引发对少年班贡献的正面回顾）；2026年高考周期声誉偏负面（涉及师德师风事件），但整体 关注度有限；抖音热度总排名第12位，评价为高热，短视频曝光量高，反映报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，该校拥有19个A-及以 上学科，其中数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程等8个学科获评A+，学科实力顶尖，对理科考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与中科大优势学科高度契合；福建省物理类考生数从2021年约11.7万持续增长至2025年约19.2万，2026年 总考生约26.8万，按近年物理类占比约76%估算物理类约20.4万人，较2025年增长约6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争，整体平稳。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次稳定前移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、福建省物理类考生规模持续扩大（竞争加剧）、学校顶尖层次与优势学科吸引力强劲、 抖音高热反映报考关注升温，在2025年基准458名基础上预计位次小幅前移；预测最低位次约448名，区间394–502名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）（含数学类/物理学类）
- 工科试验班（拔尖计划英才班）（含计算机类/电子信息类）
- 量子信息科学（未来技术学院）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术）
- 人工智能
- 电子信息类（信息科技方向/集成电路方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（航空航天、人形机器人、低碳能源技术及安全）
- 物理学类（含物理学、应用物理学等）
- 化学类（智能化学与先进材料）
- 生物科学类（含生物科学、生物技术、临床医学（5年））。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（394–502名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如省排400名以内）可重点冲刺一档拔尖计划英才班；位次接近区间上限（500名左右）建议以二档电子信息类、计算机类为核心，三档工科试验班保底。中科大专业设置以理科试验班和工科试验班大类为主，入校后分流，报考时需 关注具体分流方向与个人兴趣匹配。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Physics Category in Fujian Province were approximately 489, 470, 461, 475, and 458, showing a slight fluctuating upward trend. Over the past 5 years, rankings have been stable within the 458–489 range, with a baseline ranking of about 458 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Fujian's Physics Category was 30 students from 2021 to 2025, and remains 30 for 2026, unchanged for 6 consecutive years, indicating no expansion or contraction signals at the plan level, with a basically stable competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 7th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, placing it among the top-tier universities nationwide, with a strong and sustained appeal to high-scoring students. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly positive (the death of Mr. Tsung-Dao Lee triggered positive reviews of the contributions of the Special Class for the Gifted Young). In the 2026 cycle, the reputation is slightly negative (involving teacher ethics incidents), but overall attention is limited. On Douyin, it ranks 12th in overall popularity, evaluated as high heat, with high short video exposure, reflecting relatively high application interest. No significant gaps in admission files have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including 8 A+ disciplines: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, and Safety Science and Engineering. Its academic strength is top-notch, strongly attracting science-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with USTC's advantageous disciplines. The number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province has grown from approximately 117,000 in 2021 to about 192,000 in 2025. In 2026, the total number of candidates is about 268,000, with an estimated Physics Category count of about 204,000 (based on a recent Physics Category proportion of about 76%), representing an increase of about 6% compared to 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool intensifies competition, but overall remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable upward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the continued expansion of the Physics Category candidate pool in Fujian (intensifying competition), the strong appeal of the university's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines, and the high Douyin heat reflecting rising application interest, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 458. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 448, with a range of 394–502.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Science Experimental Class (Top-Notch Plan Science and Technology Elite Class) (including Mathematics/Physics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top-Notch Plan Elite Class) (including Computer Science/Electronic Information)
- Quantum Information Science (School of Future Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Electronic Information (Information Technology Direction/Integrated Circuit Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Low-Carbon Energy Technology and Safety)
- Physics (including Physics, Applied Physics, etc.)
- Chemistry (Intelligent Chemistry and Advanced Materials)
- Biological Sciences (including Biological Science, Biotechnology, Clinical Medicine (5 years)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (394–502), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within the top 400 in the province), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 Top-Notch Plan Elite Classes. If your ranking is near the upper bound (around 500), it is advisable to focus on Tier 2 Electronic Information and Computer Science majors, with Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Class as a safety. USTC's major offerings are primarily in the form of Science Experimental Classes and Engineering Experimental Classes, with specialization after enrollment. When applying, pay attention to the specific specialization directions and their alignment with personal interests.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
